notes.text: We've resolved an issue where navigating back to a list report page with inline edit caused the app to terminate unexpectedly
You can now display and remove a custom message strip on a list report page
We've optimized the use of sideEffects when executing actions on multiple rows
We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation used an incorrect value for fields with the TextOnly text arrangement
You can now define formatOptions for all fields of a column in the Table building block
We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation links in the header of an object page were incorrectly disabled
We've enhanced EasyFillDialog with list items support
You can now set up navigation to a specific section of an object page
We've resolved an issue where the properties set on the FilterField caused validation errors
